title: croton squamigerus var. obtusifolius
intro: Croton squamigerus var. obtusifolius is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly known as the spurge family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Croton squamigerus var. obtusifolius include its ability to treat various ailments such as skin infections, wounds, and fever. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
